description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:testing Docker image and three stages: lint, build, and test. Add a lint job that runs `apt update && apt install -y pylint3` then `find . -iname "*.py" | xargs pylint3`. Add a build job that runs `apt update && apt install -y python3-setuptools python3-docopt`, `python3 setup.py install`, and `genfo --help`. Add three test jobs named test:3.5, test:3.6, and test:3.7; each runs the shared script `apt update && apt install -y $PYTHON_VERSION python3-docopt flac`, `python3 genfo.py "%n - %t" tests/ template.nfo tests/ci.nfo`, and `diff tests/output.nfo tests/ci.nfo`, with PYTHON_VERSION set to python3.5, python3.6, and python3.7 respectively, and test:3.5 uses the debian:9 image while the others inherit the global image. No caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are defined.
